schema.description: UpdateTemplateRequest is the request for updating a template.

featureFlags.description: Updated feature flags (replaces all existing when update_feature_flags is true).

items.description: FeatureFlagCreate is used when creating a feature flag.

description.description: Description explaining what this feature flag enables.

image.description:
Updated image name (optional).

Superseded by stack_id (prefer it). Accepted for now and resolved to a stack id on the fly.

sessionInputs.description: Updated session inputs (replaces all existing when update_session_inputs is true).

items.description: SessionInputCreate is used when creating a session input definition on a template.

defaultValue.description: Default value when not provided by the session starter. Only used when required is false.

description.description: Description explaining what this input is for.

exposeAsEnvVar.description: Whether to expose as an ENV VAR in interactive terminal sessions.

required.description: Whether this input is required. Defaults to false (optional).

stackId.description: Updated stack id (optional, e.g. "osx-xcode-16.0.x-edge"). Preferred over image.

templateVariables.description: Updated template variables (replaces all existing when update_template_variables is true).

items.description: TemplateVariableCreate is used when creating a template variable.

exposeAsEnvVar.description: Whether to expose as an ENV VAR in interactive terminal sessions.

isSecret.description: Whether this is a secret value.

updateFeatureFlags.description: Whether to update feature_flags (false = don't touch, true = replace with provided list).

updateSessionInputs.description: Whether to update session_inputs (false = don't touch, true = replace with provided list).

updateTemplateVariables.description: Whether to update template_variables (false = don't touch, true = replace with provided list).

updateWorkspaceLinks.description: Whether to update workspace_links (false = don't touch, true = replace with provided list).

workspaceLinks.description: Updated workspace links (replaces all existing when update_workspace_links is true).

items.description: WorkspaceLinkCreate is used when creating a workspace link.

featureFlagName.description: Optional: name of the feature flag that controls visibility.
